name: ird-gst-return-helper
description: Drafts NZ IRD GST returns from receipts and invoices. Computes Box 5–15 figures for the GST101A. Does not file.
longDescription: Helps NZ businesses prepare a GST return. Reads invoices, receipts, and bank exports the user provides; classifies transactions as standard-rated, zero-rated, exempt, or out-of-scope; computes the totals for each box on the IRD GST101A form; and produces a summary the user can copy into myIR. Does not submit anything to IRD. Strict about what it will not do: no tax advice, no estimation of provisional tax, no opinion on whether something is deductible.
